Name: -1_loud_bold_colors_programs
Representative_Docs: ['The person would choose comedy, for example, that includes vulgarity, racism, or violence. It is a lack of consideration for those around them who might find these things objectionable. Actually, one of my Celtic musician bandmates has poor taste. She uses profanity gratuitously, and frequently makes vulgar statements within earshot of anyone (no filters). Above all this, however, she is a diamond in the rough, and has a heart of gold. (And, she can channel Janis Joplin better than any living person I know.)', 'People who go for things that are often overdone, very bold, or gaudy. Those who gravitate toward things that appeal to our more base instincts, such as demeaning jokes or bathroom humor.  Richard prefers to watch programs that are heavy on graphic violence or slapstick over programs that are more plot-heavy. He also gravitates for a lot of bold colors that seem to try to compete in overwhelming each other.', 'I think of someone who is loud common uncouth tacky or crass. I think of tacky attire and loud colors not bold but loud colors.  I have close friends who select muted, neutral, classic attire, They do not behave in a loud common way. I would call their tastes refined.']

Name: 0_taste_bad_like_things
Representative_Docs: ["Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste. My mother has poor taste. We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor.", "Bad taste to me usually means someone prefers things that seem ugly or just not good to me.  People with bad taste usually don't like things that are considered to be in good taste by most people. Lisa usually has poor taste.  She seems to limit herself to only a few things that she likes and refuses to even consider something new or different.", 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste. I think that people who have gaudy lawn ornaments have bad taste because in my opinion, it makes their lawns look like a disaster.']

Name: 1_person_sense_likes_poor
Representative_Docs: ["A person who is lazy with their words and really doesn't take care of themselves physically or mentally. Donald Trump is the worst. He talks like he has no education and has done no favors for the American public. He seems to be arrogant and egotistic where the only important person in the world is himself.", 'A person who does not respect others and uses horrible language around others to make their selves look big! Someone who has a bad moral character  I know a person who thinks he is the best HeLies and would cheat anyone out of a nickel He treats women like they were trash and hates animals', 'Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn\'t realize that others may take offense. A person who can\'t distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority. I had an employee several years ago that considered herself an artist, she was always whining about how difficult it was to create something that others didn\'t seem to appreciate - she was always looking for her "audience". The problem was that her esoteric leanings may have made a great deal of sense to her but the rest of the world saw them as poorly envisioned crap.']
